purpose: Prove IAMScope emits validated admin reachability once the Env14 permission-side MFA condition is removed.
claim_surface: IAMScope can distinguish the Env14 permission-conditioned guardrail case from a closely related condition-removed positive case.
IAMScope can emit validated admin_reachability for the mutated Env15 path without blocked or inconclusive admin findings.
IAMScope can machine-score that the Env15 permission edge does not carry aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent condition evidence.
benchmark_proves: For the Env15 alice->admin path, scenario.json contains the expected sts:AssumeRole permission edge.
For the Env15 alice->admin path, that permission edge has no condition evidence.
For the Env15 alice->admin path, scenario.json contains the expected clean sts:AssumeRole trust edge.
For that path, IAMScope emitted at least one validated admin_reachability finding.
For that path, IAMScope emitted zero blocked admin_reachability findings.
For that path, IAMScope emitted zero inconclusive admin_reachability findings.
benchmark_does_not_prove: It does not yet machine-score the pairwise delta versus Env14 as a single combined assertion.
It does not prove broader permission-condition mutation coverage.
It does not prove runtime MFA behavior.
unknowns_remaining: How richer permission-condition operators behave remains unknown here.
Whether every permission-condition removal should validate remains unproven here.

environment.notes: Mutation of Env14 with only the identity-policy MFA condition removed.

ground_truth.reason: Alice can assume env15-admin, env15-admin trusts Alice without an MFA condition on the caller-side permission, and env15-admin has AdministratorAccess.

directly_proven_if_pass: The exact Env15 alice->admin permission edge exists structurally.
The exact Env15 alice->admin permission edge has no aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent condition evidence.
The exact Env15 alice->admin trust edge exists structurally.
The exact Env15 alice->admin path is emitted as validated admin reachability.
The exact Env15 alice->admin path is not emitted as blocked or inconclusive.
strongly_supported_if_pass: IAMScope responds meaningfully to this narrow permission-condition removal in a controlled real-AWS case.
only_implied_even_if_pass: Broader permission-condition mutation behavior outside this exact case remains only implied.
